items.title: The Panasonic LUMIX L10 May Just Be the Filmmakers’ FUJIFILM X100VI
items.summary: Panasonic has just announced its much-anticipated LX100 successor – the Panasonic LUMIX L10. The market’s anticipation is already exploding, which somewhat reminded me of the highly popular FUJIFILM X…

items.title: Bank of England Considers Putting Wildlife Photos on Banknotes
items.summary: Some lucky photographers may have their work immortalized on British banknotes after the Bank of England asked the public to select animals to replace the historical figures that currently sit on the…

items.title: You Can Now Take Photos With Your AirPods in iOS 26
items.summary: iPhone users can now take photos and record videos remotely using their AirPods in supported camera apps with iOS 26. [Read More]

items.title: Police Sergeant Charged With Stealing Photographer’s Camera Bag From Delaney Hall Protests
items.summary: A police sergeant from New Jersey has been charged with stealing a photographer's bag after she was hit with a 2x4 and had to seek medical attention. [Read More]
